extracted_clauses: Deliverables: Contractor shall deliver weekly status reports and monthly performance dashboards.
Timeline: All deliverables must be completed within 90 days of project initiation.

Milestones: Project shall be completed in three phases:
   - Phase 1: Requirements gathering (30 days)
   - Phase 2: Implementation (45 days)
   - Phase 3: Testing and deployment (15 days)

4.
Performance Standards: Response time for critical issues shall not exceed 2 hours.
Quality Standards: All deliverables must meet ISO 9001 quality standards.
Reporting: Monthly performance reports must be submitted by the 5th business day of each month.
Support Obligations: Contractor shall provide 24/7 technical support for production systems.
